BLOOM

Between Earth & Soul — where grounding meets awakening

May 28 – 31, 2026  ·  Warren, Connecticut

Claim Your Place
The Invitation

"Come home to yourself.
Come alive in sisterhood."

A long weekend retreat experience woven to connect, heal, and restore — awakening the divine feminine energy that lives within you. Held at a breathtaking private estate in Warren, Connecticut, where floor-to-ceiling glass meets ancient forest and rolling hills meet open sky.

A sacred pause held in nature, ceremony, and the kind of sisterhood that changes you.

The Infinite,
the Beyond

The Place

Perched above the valley, held by the forest

A rare private estate in Warren, Connecticut — surrounded by ancient trees, overlooking a shimmering lake and rolling hills. Floor-to-ceiling glass walls dissolve the boundary between inside and outside. A sun-soaked deck where mornings begin in stillness and evenings end in fire.

Nourishment

Ayurvedic meals crafted by Sarah Lyons

Every meal is an act of devotion. Our chef and Jadeva member Sarah Lyons brings the wisdom of Ayurveda to the table — seasonal, plant-forward, deeply nourishing food designed to support your body's natural rhythms of rest, release, and renewal. Animal protein is also available for those who choose it.

All meals included from Thursday arrival dinner through Sunday closing ceremony lunch.
